_source: India migration 2026-06-03 — Options Wheel universe for NSE F&O
_note: Multi-underlying Nifty/BankNifty wheel strategy. NSE F&O segment.
_nse_fo_note: NSE F&O index options are cash-settled (European-style). Stock options are American-style. Weekly expiry available for Nifty (every Thursday) and BankNifty (every Wednesday). Monthly expiry last Thursday of month.
_min_option_volume_note: Minimum 1 lakh contracts in 30-day window. NSE index options are extremely liquid (top global by volume).
_starter_allowlist_note: Nifty 50 index, Bank Nifty index, Nifty Financial Services index — the three most liquid weekly-expiry F&O contracts on NSE.
_lot_sizes_note: NSE F&O contracts are in lots, not individual units. Lot sizes are revised by SEBI periodically. Current as of 2026-06-03.
